education.thesis_title: Decoding Motor Intentions from EEG using Attention-based Deep Learning

publications.title: Transformer-based Decoding of Motor Imagery EEG for Brain-Computer Interfaces
Cross-subject Transfer Learning for EEG-based BCI Systems
publications.venue: NeurIPS 2022 Workshop on Machine Learning for Health

intro_call_summary: Student has a strong engineering + neuroscience blend and is passionate about restoring motor function in paralysed patients via BCIs. Wants a lab with access to human EEG/ECoG data and ideally clinical collaborators. Strong preference for groups with NSF or NIH funding. Open to cross-disciplinary positions in biomedical engineering departments.
resume_text: IISc graduate with 2 publications in neural decoding and BCI. Experienced in EEG preprocessing pipelines and transformer architectures applied to neural time series. Seeking PhD in computational neuroscience or BME.
